name.full: Paychex Basic Chatbot AI Agent for Microsoft 365 Copilot

description.short: AI-powered HR assistant for Paychex users
description.full: Paychex Basic Chatbot is an AI-powered assistant that helps employees and managers with Payroll tasks, questions, and workflows directly within Microsoft 365 Copilot.

commands.title: What can you do?
commands.description: Learn what I can help you with — from answering questions to assisting with tasks and guiding you through workflows.

commands.title: What data can you access?
commands.description: See which data sources I can use and how I retrieve information to support your requests.

commands.title: What are best practices for working with you?
commands.description: Discover how to get the best results — ask clear questions, provide context, and refine prompts for more accurate answers.
